meaning: n.请愿,情愿书,诉状,陈情书v.请求,恳求,请愿
examples: Jill volunteered to organize a petition.
We're collecting signatures for a petition.
They turned in a petition with 80 000 signatures.
She was reduced to having to petition the court for money to get her lawn mowed.
Much of the tourist industry was opposed and a petition signed by more than 20, 000 opponents was gathered.
